===Pokémon: Twilight Wings=== Milo made a cameo appearance in ''[[TW01|Letter]]''. Milo briefly appeared in ''[[TW03|Buddy]]'', where [[Hop]]'s {{p|Wooloo}} landed on his farm after running away from its Trainer. He was alerted to its presence by his herd of Wooloo. Upon seeing its tag, Milo arranged for a [[Flying Taxi]] to come and take Hop's Wooloo home. In ''[[TW04|Early-Evening Waves]]'', Milo was seen on television defeating [[Nessa]] during the [[Galar League|Champions Cup]]. In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', Milo gave his thoughts about the Champion [[Leon]] in an interview. In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Milo was seen rolling up some hay on the field with his Wooloo. He was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out onto the field for the opening ceremony of the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. ====Pokémon==== =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Eldegoss |type1=Grass |img=830Eldegoss.png |epnum=TW04 |epname=Early-Evening Waves |desc=During the narration of his [[Galar League|Champions Cup]] {{pkmn|battle}} against [[Nessa]], it was revealed that Milo had used his {{p|Eldegoss}} against Nessa's Drednaw. Eldegoss was able to use [[Dynamax]]. None of Eldegoss's moves are known.{{tt|*|Eldegoss is implied to know a damaging Grass-type move due to the use of Max Overgrowth}}
While Dynamaxed, it can use {{m|Max Overgrowth}}{{tt|*|mentioned and used off-screen}}.}} =====Herds===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Milo |pkmn=Wooloo |type1=Normal |img=Milo Wooloo TW.png |epnum=TW03 |epname=Buddy |desc=Milo has multiple {{p|Wooloo}} on his farm. They appeared when [[Hop]]'s Wooloo landed on the farm after running away from its Trainer. None of Wooloo's moves are known.}}
